domain: medical, lab, and dental non-implant mechanical hardware

ideas.idea_title: Dental Handpiece Sterilization Cassette Hinge Block
ideas.product_context: Reusable autoclavable cassette used in dental clinics to organize high-speed handpieces during cleaning and sterilization.
ideas.core_function: Provides a precision pivot and latch interface for the cassette lid while surviving repeated thermal cycles.
ideas.likely_main_part: Machined stainless hinge-and-latch end block with twin hinge barrels, spring slot, drain reliefs, and keyed lid stops.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Combines coaxial hinge bores, thin sterilization-drain channels, asymmetric latch geometry, filleted transitions, and tight positional relationships between functional features.

ideas.product_context: Accessory for a small clinical or research centrifuge that lets a fixed-angle rotor accept a different sample tube size.
ideas.core_function: Centers and supports sample tubes at a defined angle while preserving balance and allowing easy removal.
ideas.likely_main_part: Machined aluminum conical tube sleeve with angled bore, stepped tube seat, extraction notch, balance flats, and bottom relief pocket.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Requires angled cylindrical cuts through a tapered body, nested coaxial seats, mass-reduction pockets, orientation-specific notches, and smooth internal radii.

ideas.product_context: Clamp component for a heated microscope stage used in pathology or lab sample preparation.
ideas.core_function: Holds glass slides flat against a heated surface without obscuring the viewing area.
ideas.likely_main_part: Machined spring clamp arm with low-profile finger pads, pivot bore, torsion spring pocket, travel stop, and relieved underside.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests thin compliant arm geometry, ergonomic pad contours, undercuts, pivot alignment, local thickness changes, and small-radius clearances.

ideas.product_context: Reusable mechanical handle for dental impression trays that allows controlled angular positioning before impression material is loaded.
ideas.core_function: Locks the tray at selectable angles for easier placement in different patient mouth geometries.
ideas.likely_main_part: Machined ratcheting handle yoke with curved tooth sector, cross-pin holes, thumb-release pocket, and tray dovetail receiver.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Includes curved ratchet teeth, mating dovetail geometry, yoke arms with aligned bores, ergonomic recesses, and load-bearing fillets.

ideas.product_context: Fixture used during pipette calibration to hold small vessels or weighing boats in a repeatable position on an analytical balance.
ideas.core_function: Positions calibration containers consistently while minimizing contact area and trapped liquid.
ideas.likely_main_part: Machined stainless weighing cradle with shallow spherical seat, radial drainage grooves, three-point feet, and tweezer access cutouts.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Challenges representation of shallow curved seating surfaces, radial groove patterns, tiny support feet, symmetric but interrupted geometry, and delicate edge breaks.

ideas.product_context: Component in a dental lab articulator used to simulate jaw movement for crown and denture work.
ideas.core_function: Guides a condyle pin along a controlled curved path with adjustable mechanical stops.
ideas.likely_main_part: Machined guide block with curved slot track, angle scale boss, stop-screw channels, mounting counterbores, and reference flats.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests swept slot geometry, compound curved paths, screw-adjustment details, engraved or raised indexing features, and datum-critical mounting surfaces.

ideas.product_context: Replaceable jaw component for a laboratory microtome used to section paraffin-embedded tissue samples.
ideas.core_function: Clamps a thin disposable blade at a precise rake angle while allowing safe blade exchange.
ideas.likely_main_part: Machined hardened steel clamping jaw with long angled blade shelf, serrated grip ridge, screw bosses, clearance scallops, and safety chamfers.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Requires long precision angled planes, very thin ledges, repeated fine ridges, screw clamping geometry, chamfer hierarchy, and strict parallelism.

ideas.product_context: Manual bench tool used by orthodontic technicians to form repeatable bends in archwire outside the patient mouth.
ideas.core_function: Provides multiple pin diameters and bend radii on a compact rotating turret.
ideas.likely_main_part: Machined circular turret disk with eccentric forming pins, indexed detent pockets, central bearing bore, radius grooves, and locking notch.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Combines circular indexing, repeated off-axis features, mixed pin bosses, shallow forming grooves, detent geometry, and rotational symmetry broken by locks.

ideas.product_context: Mechanism component in a benchtop sample tube decapper for non-automated or semi-automated lab workflows.
ideas.core_function: Transforms a handle motion into a controlled lifting and twisting action on screw caps.
ideas.likely_main_part: Machined cam plate with spiral cam slot, follower entry ramp, mounting holes, hard stops, and lightening pockets.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests noncircular slot paths, ramped cam surfaces, mechanical stop faces, offset mounting patterns, and pockets that must avoid functional cam regions.

ideas.product_context: Reusable collar for a dental suction line debris trap that lets staff remove a collection cup for cleaning.
ideas.core_function: Locks a transparent trap cup onto the suction housing with a quarter-turn bayonet action.
ideas.likely_main_part: Machined polymer or aluminum bayonet collar with internal interrupted lugs, grip flutes, O-ring groove, stop tabs, and drain orientation mark.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Requires internal bayonet features, annular sealing grooves, interrupted rotational geometry, exterior grip patterning, and precise axial clearances.
